text:
is a pachinko machine developed by Bisty, it was based on the Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time film, it was released on 18 December 2023. Two new songs were made for the machine, "Shuketsu no Yari" and "Shuketsu no Hajimari", both sung by Megumi Hayashibara.
